task_completion.description: Access OrientDB Studio and the demodb database
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the OrientDB Studio interface at localhost:2480, logged into the 'demodb' database.

task_completion.description: Create HasVisited edges for the target cohort
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query execution or graph view showing the creation of 'HasVisited' edges between the profiles (sophie.martin, luca.rossi, elena.petrakis) and their respective monuments.
Query execution (e.g., CREATE CLASS ItinerarySummary) or the Schema tab showing the new 'ItinerarySummary' class.

task_completion.description: Create an index on the ItinerarySummary schema
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query execution (e.g., CREATE INDEX) or the Schema/Indexes tab showing an index created for the 'ItinerarySummary' class.

task_completion.description: Insert summary rows with exact counts and curation tag
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query execution or Browse tab showing 3 records in 'ItinerarySummary'. The records must show HotelCount=1, RestaurantCount=1, AttractionCount=1, the correct Country (France, Italy, Greece), and CurationTag='heritage_trio_2026q1'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the OrientDB Studio GUI in a web browser, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed queries or used the GUI to modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show actual database responses, such as 'Record created successfully', query results, or updated schema views.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target cohort visits: sophie.martin@example.com -> Eiffel Tower (France), luca.rossi@example.com -> Colosseum (Italy), elena.petrakis@example.com -> Parthenon (Greece). Expected summary records must have exactly HotelCount=1, RestaurantCount=1, AttractionCount=1, and CurationTag='heritage_trio_2026q1'.
